channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: "A future-proof powerhouse for demanding tasks": MSI's RTX5090 creative laptop gets a $300 price cut — Stealth A16 packs workstation-level power
item.description: MSI’s Stealth A16 pairs a Ryzen AI 9 HX 370 processor with 64GB of DDR5 and a 2TB NVMe SSD for demanding creative projects and heavy multitasking.

item.title: Laptops Are About to Get Very Exciting Again… Thanks to Nvidia
item.description: Nvidia is about to throw another wrench into laptops led by Intel, AMD, and Qualcomm.

item.title: Moins de 360 euros pour un moniteur OLED ? La meilleure technologie d’affichage sur PC est (enfin) abordable [Sponso]
item.description: L’OLED, c’est bien. Très bien même, surtout si l’on souhaite jouer dans les meilleures conditions possibles. Le problème, c’est qu’un bon moniteur OLED, c’est cher. Enfin presque, parce qu’en ce moment, PcComponentes vous file un coup de pouce pour (enfin) franchir le pas et oublier votre vieille dalle LCD.

item.title: Le stockage du MacBook Neo peut passer à 1 To et c’est grâce à l’iPhone 16 Pro
item.description: Pour peu que vous n'ayez (vraiment) pas peur de bricoler, vous pouvez quadrupler ou au pire doubler l'espace de stockage de votre MacBook Neo.

item.title: Huge changes are coming to Xbox Achievements, including new visuals, 'more control over how your accomplishments are presented', and the ability to highlight your 100% completed games
item.description: Microsoft has announced a huge visual overhaul to Xbox Achievements that will make it easier for players to spotlight their games and accomplishments.

item.title: Message RCS : tout comprendre au remplaçant du SMS
item.description: Les messages RCS (Rich Communication Services) sont vus comme l'avenir du simple protocole SMS/MMS. Mais qu'est-ce vraiment que cette technologie fortement mise en avant par Google et ses partenaires ?

item.title: Ce virus regarde toutes les photos de votre smartphone, mais pour quoi faire ?
item.description: Une nouvelle version du malware mobile SparkCat est parvenu à pénétrer sur le Play Store et sur l'App Store. Le malware cherche à parcourir toutes les photos des utilisateurs. Et il a une bonne raison pour le faire.

item.title: Go Titan Hunting in a Clip From This Week’s ‘Monarch: Legacy of Monsters’ (Exclusive)
item.description: Titan X is ready to be found in a new look at the sophomore season of Apple TV's monster-filled series.

item.title: Tesla is un-canceling its plan to build a smaller, cheaper EV: report
item.description: It looks like a smaller, cheaper Tesla is back on the menu. Today, Reuters is reporting that the electric automaker is calling around to suppliers about building an all-new - that is, not based on the Model 3 or the Model Y - electric SUV that would be more affordable than its current lineup. The […]

item.title: In Medical First, a Single Therapy Knocked Out 3 Autoimmune Diseases at Once
item.description: CAR T-cell therapy could help tackle the most severe cases that haven't responded to other treatments.

item.title: Fubo’s mobile app is pushing more sports highlights
item.description: Fubo is rolling out a big mobile app update today that adds a bunch of new features, including short-form videos with news about your favorite teams and leagues. You'll also find a carousel of live video as soon as you open the app, allowing you to preview games before you tap into them. The live […]

item.title: Gen Z’s Use of AI Is Plateauing as Youth Feel Less Hopeful About the Tech
item.description: Adoption by the rising generation in the workforce could have big implications for the economy.

item.title: IKEA just launched a tiny motion-sensitive light that you can stick anywhere — and you can get two for $5 right now
item.description: You can stick the IKEA Gömpyssling lights anywhere, and they're so versatile you'll want a set for every room.

item.title: Undertone's director Ian Tuason reveals why the horror movie's set felt haunted: 'There was a lot of unexpected things happening'
item.description: Undertone's director revealed the set felt like it was haunted as strange things kept happening.

item.title: Microsoft supprime Copilot du Bloc-notes, sauf que ça ne change rien
item.description: Après l'avoir annoncé, Microsoft s'attaque réellement à retirer Copilot du moindre recoin de Windows 11. L'application Bloc-notes démarre le bal, mais il y a une subtilité.

item.title: Some TV fans aren’t happy about Samsung dropping QD-OLED from its mid-range OLED TVs — but our early measurements of the LG C6 show why it probably makes sense
item.description: Some TV fans don't like the change, but with the performance difference cut, wouldn't you choose the cheaper panel?

item.title: Even with the RAM crisis, there are still great value gaming laptop deals — these 5 hand-picked options are up to $400 off
item.description: These are your best bets if you're on a budget today

item.title: Comment mettre de l’argent sur son compte PayPal ?
item.description: PayPal est un moyen de paiement en ligne reconnu dans le monde entier comme l'une des solutions les plus fiables pour effectuer des transactions. Voici toutes les méthodes permettant de créditer son compte que ce soit sur l'application mobile ou via le site de PayPal.

item.title: Amazon CEO takes aim at Nvidia, Intel, Starlink, more in annual shareholder letter
item.description: Andy Jassy's annual shareholder letter reads something like a diss track to a wide range of competitors as he defends spending $200 billion in capex.

item.title: Closing the implementation gap in America's cyber strategy
item.description: National defense shifts from soft power to hard power through aggressive public-private collaboration and AI.

item.title: UK NHS chief champions Palantir’s 'outstanding results’ in England, pushes for deeper rollout despite growing staff concerns
item.description: NHS staff are concerned about Palantir access to database containing details on 1.5 million staff, but NHS Data Chief Ming Tang says her team needs to 'maintain our focus' in the face of staff concerns over Palantir's reputation

item.title: Vente flash : il ne reste plus beaucoup de cartes graphiques MSI Nvidia GeForce RTX 5060 Ti 8G en promo à 429,90 €
item.description: Avec cette vente flash, Amazon propose la carte graphique MSI Nvidia GeForce RTX 5060 Ti 8G Gaming Trio OC pour 429,90 euros au lieu de 505 euros, avec en cadeau 25 euros de codes Steam.

item.title: 'Go from prototype to launch in days rather than months': Anthropic reveals Claude Managed Agents, promises to make agent building '10x faster'
item.description: Anthropic has introduced its own centralized AI agent management platform, which can make building them 10 times faster.

item.title: AI companies are tightening token limits. The last one to blink may win
item.description: OpenAI and Anthropic are reining in high-volume usage as developers and businesses strain limited compute capacity. For years, AI companies gave users unfettered access to the candy store, encouraging them to think of tokens, the chunks of text AI reads and writes, as effectively infinite.

item.title: Samsung has rolled out the One UI 8.5 beta to more phones — complete with a sharing feature we've been waiting for
item.description: The One UI 8.5 beta has now landed on more phones, and also adds AirDrop support.

item.title: Tesla à 25 000 € : une fuite dévoile le petit SUV électrique, et il va vous surprendre
item.description: Après des années d’errance entre promesses et fausses joies, Tesla pourrait bien être en train de développer secrètement une petite voiture électrique accessible. Plusieurs sources internes ont laissé échapper des informations sur ce véhicule très attendu.

item.title: Bientôt tous les jeux Steam sur votre smartphone ? Wine prépare son retour sur Android
item.description: Wine, le logiciel Linux permettant de faire tourner des jeux et des logiciels Windows, revitalise son pilote Android. Nos smartphones pourraient bien faire tourner les .exe.

item.title: MAGA Media Seems to Have Hit Its Breaking Point Over Iran
item.description: "The online right wasn’t supportive and there wasn’t anything that was going to change that," says one person familiar with the Republican influencer pipeline.

item.title: Google introduces AI-generated avatars to YouTube Shorts
item.description: A new feature that lets you create an AI avatar with your likeness is now live on YouTube. First announced in a blog post earlier this year, avatars are designed to be used in Shorts (provided you still allow them to show up), allowing you to insert yourself into video content in a way that YouTube deems to be safe and secure. YouTube’s approach to combatting the AI sloppification of the internet and the proliferation of deepfakes appears to be adding more and more AI features to its platform, framing this latest addition as a tool that gives creators more control of their digital identities. ...

item.title: A jury is about to decide the fate of Ticketmaster
item.description: Consumer complaints about Ticketmaster are so voluminous at state attorneys general offices that Pennsylvania's comes with an explicit plea for residents lodging a grievance about the company to be patient for a response. That kind of pressure has driven more than 30 states to push forward with claims that Live Nation-Ticketmaster illegally monopolized parts of […]...

item.title: Finally, a First Look at Brad Bird’s New Animated Sci-Fi Detective Movie
item.description: 'Ray Gunn' features the voices of Sam Rockwell and Scarlett Johansson and hits Netflix later this year.

item.title: The AI industry’s race for profits is now existential
item.description: Today on Decoder, let’s talk about the looming AI monetization cliff, and whether some of the biggest companies in the space can become real, profitable businesses before they careen right off it. My guest today is Hayden Field, who’s our senior AI reporter here at The Verge. She’s been keeping close tabs on both Anthropic […]

item.title: Final 2 days to save up to $500 on your TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 ticket
item.description: Ticket discounts of up to $500 will end tomorrow, April 10, at 11:59 p.m. PT. After that, prices for TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 go up again. Miss this, and you’ll be paying more for the same access to one of the most anticipated tech epicenters of the year. Register now to lock in these savings.

item.title: Netflix reveals first-look images of The Incredibles director's new movie Ray Gunn — and its starry cast and plot details have instantly caught my eye
item.description: Billed as a 1940s-era sci-fi detective story, Ray Gunn will premiere on Netflix sometime later this year.

item.title: Crimson Desert is finally playable on Intel Arc GPUs after driver update — but there's still plenty of work to be done
item.description: Official Intel GPU support in Crimson Desert is still on the way via Pearl Abyss, but the latest driver has made the game playable for Arc GPU users.

item.title: ‘Just flat-out fun’ — I was a Nothing-design skeptic, but 3 things I found when reviewing the Phone (4a) Pro turned me into a believer
item.description: The look of early Nothing phones left me lukewarm, but here’s how its latest handset totally won me over.

item.title: Spotify now lets everyone turn off videos in its app
item.description: The controls can be used to choose an audio-first experience on the app or a video-enhanced one, Spotify says.

item.title: Comment changer ses DNS sur Windows, Android, iPhone pour accéder à un web plus rapide ?
item.description: Le serveur DNS est le premier intermédiaire entre nos appareils et le site web. Selon son fournisseur, cela peut poser des problèmes. Avec ce dossier, vous en saurez plus sur cet élément clé du web, quel serveur choisir pour surfer plus vite et comment configurer son smartphone Android ou iOS ou son PC.

item.title: Retour surprise du Galaxy Z TriFold : l’ultime chance de s’offrir le smartphone à trois écrans
item.description: Bonne nouvelle : Samsung vient d'annoncer un réassort inattendu de son smartphone pliable format XXL. Mais attention, cette vente aux allures de baroud d'honneur sera bel et bien votre dernière occasion de l'acquérir.

item.title: The FBI Didn't Answer Texts From Minnesota Investigators for Days After Renee Good’s Killing
item.description: Messages sent to the FBI by an investigator with the Minnesota Bureau of Criminal Apprehension went ignored for at least two days, per records obtained by WIRED.

item.title: Coup de théâtre : Elon Musk aurait changé d’avis pour enfin lancer une Tesla compacte et abordable
item.description: Face à l'érosion de ses ventes, Tesla opère un virage stratégique inattendu. Selon de récentes indiscrétions, l'entreprise d'Elon Musk développerait en secret un tout nouveau SUV électrique compact et abordable, taillé sur mesure pour concurrencer les best-sellers européens. Poids plume, tarif cassé et retour au pragmatisme face à la réalité du marché : voici les premiers secrets de ce modèle censé relancer la machine Tesla. ...

item.title: Decathlon brade le radar Garmin avec feu arrière pour renforcer votre sécurité à vélo sans payer le prix fort
item.description: Le Garmin Varia RTL515 est un accessoire pratique pour voir et être vu à vélo, que vous retrouvez en promotion chez Decathlon à 129 euros, contre 159 euros habituellement.

item.title: DJI Avinox gonfle les performances des vélos électriques avec 2 nouveaux moteurs surpuissants
item.description: DJI Avinox est de retour avec deux nouveaux modèles de moteurs pour vélos électriques, dont l’un est destiné à des performances sportives intenses. Deux écrans et une nouvelle batterie ont également été présentés par la marque.

item.title: BlackBerry stock is rising today, but this time it’s not a meme thing
item.description: The bump comes after dedicated turnaround efforts focused on strengthening BlackBerry’s cybersecurity and embedded software system divisions. One of our favorite meme stocks is up more than 9%, but this time it’s for legit business reasons.

item.title: There's a huge Brooks running shoe sale at Amazon — I found the 12 best deals that I'd buy with up to 30% off
item.description: Brooks makes some of the best running shoes on the market, and I've hand-picked the 12 best deals at Amazon, with up to 30% off and prices from just $86.

item.title: DJI dévoile la seconde génération de ses VTT électriques, avec le surpuissant moteur Avinox M2
item.description: Successeurs des PL, les nouveaux VTTAE Amflow PX et PR Carbon veulent marquer le coup avec l’intégration des tout nouveaux moteurs maison de DJI, les Avinox M2S et M2.

item.title: Instagram expands its movie inspired content restrictions for teens internationally
item.description: Instagram first debuted its movie rating inspired content settings in limited countries in 2025.

item.title: There's a sneaky way to watch the Masters 2026 for *FREE*
item.description: We've found a way that you can stream Masters 2026 golf from the Augusta National for free from anywhere in the world.
